stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex is a simplified pressure chart showing high and low pressure and some isobars with various vectors to illustrate the geostrophic wind in the Northern Hemisphere. Which of the options below correctly labels the various vectors?

options.a: (1) Coriolis Force; (2) Pressure Gradient Force; (3) Geostrophic wind.
options.b: (1) Pressure Gradient Force; (2) Geostrophic wind; (3) Coriolis Force.
options.c: (1) Coriolis Force; (2) Geostrophic Wind; (3) Pressure Gradient Force.
options.d: (1) Pressure Gradient Force; (2) Coriolis Force; (3) Geostrophic wind.
